title: 50 Pack Disposable Bowls 16oz Eco-Friendly Sugarcane Strong Brown Heavy Duty Compostable Soup Round Bowls for Hot Food Wedding
features: MATERIAL: This disposable paper bowls made of natural sugarcane fibre, that is a biodegradable and renewable material. These eco-friendly strong disposable bowls are organic and it’s a perfect substitute for non-recyclable materials. After using just toss them in the compost bin.

PACK INCLUDE: Include 50 pack brown paper bowls disposable with capacity of 16 ounces. According to your demand, stock up these biodegradable bowls for your daily using. We bring you the best quality disposable serving bowls at the best price.

STRONG PAPER BOWLS: These sugarcane bowls are super rigid, waterproof and oil resistant, not easily cut, stronger than ordinary paper bowls. You can be sure that these disposable bowls for hot food won't get easily damaged by cutlery, heat, or greasy foods.
SAFE AND RELIABLE: This disposable soup bowls can be safely used in the microwave and be stored in the freezer. Nor will it melt or deform when heated in the microwave or regular oven.

MULTIFUNCTIONAL APPLICATIONS: You can use these disposable bowls for parties to hot and cold meals, soup, desserts, salads, ice cream and so on. Suitable for party, gathering, wedding, picnic, BBQ, or daily use.
description: Product Description 12/16oz Natural sugarcane fibre These disposable tableware products made from sugarcane bagasse material and no toxic chemicals. No wax lining, BPA-free, gluten-free, you can use our disposable bowls with peace of mind. No wax lining and BPA-fre, you can use our disposable paper plates with peace of mind. The bagasse disposable plate is stronger, water and oil resistant, not easy to cut. You can be sure that these disposable bowls for hot food won't get easily damaged by cutlery, heat, or greasy foods. Water and oil-resistant You can be sure that these disposable bowls for hot food won't get easily damaged by cutlery, heat, or greasy foods. Microwave and freezer safe You can use these brown disposable plates for spaghetti, pizza, snacks, salads, ice cream, etc. Not Washing These plates are natural ingredient and sugarcane production. Use these can free your hands from dishwashing. Bagasse products is a sustainable and renewable you can compost these bowls in rich soil after using. Without additives and odors. Even children can safely use our disposable plates.
